name: dorabot
description: macOS app for 24/7 AI agents in an IDE with memory, scheduled tasks, browser use + access to Whatsapp, Telegram, Slack.

commit.message: bump v0.2.60

feat: redesign research view with previews, keyboard nav, context menus

- Server returns content preview (first 200 chars) with research.list
- Flat sorted list with dense rows showing title + preview snippet
- j/k navigation, Enter to open, x to cycle status, Cmd+N to create
- Cmd+Left / Esc to go back from detail view, e to edit
- Right-click context menu with open/status/delete
- Clickable status dots for quick status cycling
- Detail page: larger content area, bigger title, keyboard hints
bump v0.2.59

fix: add tasks.view RPC handler for task detail view

TaskDetailView called tasks.view but no handler existed, causing
"unknown method" error when clicking tasks in the kanban board.
bump v0.2.58

fix: close orphan subagent scopes in session history replay

When a subagent (Task/Agent tool) is interrupted and never produces a
tool_result, the sessionMessagesToChatItems parser kept the scope open
forever, swallowing all subsequent messages into invisible subItems.
This caused entire chunks of conversation to vanish on page refresh.

Fix: detect orphan scopes when a top-level user or assistant message
appears while a subagent scope is still open, close the scope, and
render subsequent messages normally.
bump v0.2.57
bump v0.2.57

Replace O(n²) LCS diff with Myers algorithm via diff library

The custom LCS diff was O(m*n) in time and space, causing OOM/hangs
on large files (e.g. 40k-line type definitions). Switched to the
diff npm package which uses Myers' O(ND) algorithm — a 1-line change
in a 40k-line file now diffs in ~9ms instead of hanging.

Fixed in both diff.ts (shared utility) and EditTool.tsx (had its own
copy of the same O(m*n) implementation).
update package-lock.json for v0.2.56
bump v0.2.56

Persist terminal tabs, file explorer path, and reload tree on branch switch

- Stop blanking terminal shellId on save; keep tabs across refresh
- Save/restore file explorer viewRoot, expanded dirs, selection to localStorage
- Reload file tree when git branch changes (via ref, no extra useEffect)
bump v0.2.55
Guard remaining cleanToolName calls against undefined
Guard cleanToolName call in gateway server against undefined tool name
bump v0.2.54
Guard cleanToolName against undefined input
bump v0.2.53
Fix crash when agent run source is undefined
bump v0.2.52

Suppress transient WebSocket disconnection errors in file explorer

- Bridge: ws close codes 1005/1006 now produce 'connection_lost' instead of raw code
- File explorer: disconnection errors preserve existing entries instead of showing error inline
bump v0.2.51

Terminal scrollback persistence, checkpoint recovery, session history

- 256KB ring buffer per shell captures PTY output, restores on reclaim
- Scrollback saved to ~/.dorabot/shells/ on exit/kill/shutdown (30d cleanup)
- Checkpoint system: saves seq at agent.result, skips full replay on cold start
- Session history sidebar: search, date groups, open old sessions in tabs
- shellId path traversal validation, latin1 encoding fix for PTY data
- Fixed side effects in setTabs updaters, dedup race in openSessionTab
- Delete session now closes its tab, SessionInfo type deduplicated

Fix chat replay on refresh and terminal killed on refresh

1. Persist seq counters in sessionStorage so page refresh resumes
   from last known position instead of replaying all events from 0.
   Debounced 500ms persist, sync flush on unmount.

2. Shell processes get 60s grace period on client disconnect instead
   of immediate kill. Reconnecting client reclaims shells via
   shell.spawn with same shellId, cancelling the orphan timer.

Support both Agent and Task tool names

Claude Code v2.1.63 renamed Task tool to Agent. Add Agent as
primary key in all UI maps and server handlers while keeping
Task as backward-compatible alias for older sessions.
bump v0.2.50

fix: route notification messages through broadcasts, add pulse/schedule toasts

macNotify was a no-op but was the only notification path for scheduler
starts, task CRUD, and research updates. Broadcast events now carry a
message field so the desktop shows specific toasts ("Task started: X",
"Project created: Y") instead of generic "Projects updated". Added
pulse:started and schedule:started handlers so scheduled runs are no
longer silent. Also renames goals -> projects throughout and adds Full
Disk Access to onboarding permissions.

refactor: rename goals to projects, strip plan system, remove dead code

- Rename all MCP tools from goals_* to projects_*
- Rename RPC endpoints (goals.list -> projects.list, etc)
- Rename broadcast events (goals.update -> projects.update)
- Strip PLAN.md filesystem from tasks (plan, planDocPath fields removed)
- Remove tasks.plan.read/write RPCs
- Remove dead plans/ideas/worktree RPC handlers and runner code
- Delete dead PlanDialog.tsx, TaskDetailSheet.tsx
- Update system prompt, autonomous pulse, desktop UI registries
- Clean up Chat.tsx, useGateway, App.tsx event listeners
- 1,198 lines deleted, 145 added
icon update

fix: overhaul auto-update pipeline

- Fix restart-to-update: use app.relaunch + app.quit instead of
  quitAndInstall (which silently fails on macOS when Squirrel native
  updater hasn't separately downloaded the update)
- Fix releaseType: draft -> release in electron-builder.yml so the
  bundled app-update.yml tells electron-updater to check published
  releases (drafts are only visible to repo collaborators)
- Sync desktop/package.json version (was stuck at 0.2.17 since initial
  release, causing every build to ship with wrong bundle version)
- Add postversion hook to auto-sync desktop/package.json on npm version
quick fixes

fix: use app.relaunch + app.quit for restart-to-update on macOS

quitAndInstall relies on Squirrel native updater having separately
downloaded the update, which races with electron-updater's own download.
app.relaunch + app.quit is reliable because autoInstallOnAppQuit handles
the Squirrel install on quit.

Remove approval pipeline, simplify task system, rewrite kanban board

- Remove entire task approval system (~1000 lines): approval gates,
  pending approvals map, approve/deny RPCs, frontend components
- Simplify task statuses to 6: todo, in_progress, review, done,
  blocked, cancelled (with migration for legacy statuses)
- Rewrite kanban as multi-project board with cross-project drag-and-drop
- Rename goals to projects in system prompt, add documentation/plans
- Apply Anthropic prompting best practices to system prompt

feat(desktop): image diffs, collapsible shortcuts, sprite fix

Image diff viewer with side-by-side, slider, and toggle modes for
binary files in source control. Collapsible all-shortcuts section on
chat landing page. Fixed dorabot sprite to square aspect ratio.
shortcut help

fix: use bundled ripgrep for global search instead of user's shell

Resolves rg binary from @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk vendor dir
via require.resolve, so global search works without rg on PATH.
Rename explorer header to 'Files'

Explorer polish: VS Code-style header buttons, Cmd+Arrow folder nav

- Restyle new file/folder buttons: hidden by default, appear on header hover,
  right-aligned after breadcrumbs (VS Code explorer style)
- Header label changed from "files" to uppercase "EXPLORER"
- Add Cmd+Right to navigate into selected folder
- Add Cmd+Left to navigate up to parent directory

fix: delete existing release before electron-builder publish

v0.2.43 and v0.2.44 had no DMG assets because manually-created
releases conflicted with electron-builder's draft publish flow.
Now build.yml deletes any existing release for the tag before
building, so electron-builder can create its own draft and upload.
Bump to 0.2.45.

feat: model catalog, Codex provider hardening, chat UX improvements

Add model catalog with provider metadata, auth-state modules for
gateway and Codex, improved Chat view with better provider card,
and misc config/dependency updates.

feat(desktop): quick open, global search, and toast notifications

Add Cmd+P quick open with fuzzy file matching, Cmd+Shift+F global
search via ripgrep RPC, and toast notification system replacing
silent error swallowing throughout the app.

feat(desktop): agent settings card and editor preferences

Fill agent settings card with autonomy, reasoning effort, max budget.
Add editor preferences (font size, tab size, word wrap, minimap, line
numbers) backed by localStorage, wired into MonacoEditor.

feat(desktop): branch creation in git panel, file search, context menu

Branch picker shows create option when filter doesn't match existing.
Add file search/filter in explorer, discard changes confirmation,
open-in-terminal context menu. Expand gateway git and fs RPCs.

feat(desktop): tab rename, dirty check, keyboard shortcut help

Double-click or right-click to rename terminal/chat tabs. Confirm
before closing tabs with unsaved changes. Add Cmd+/ shortcut cheat
sheet overlay with all keybindings organized by section.

fix(desktop): preserve terminal buffer across tab switches

Render terminal tabs persistently with visibility:hidden when inactive.
Add focused prop to TerminalView for re-fit on tab switch.

fix: auto-refresh expired tokens instead of requiring app restart

When a token expires mid-session, the gateway now attempts a silent
refresh before falling back to interactive re-auth. On pre-run auth
failure, clears cached auth and retries via ensureOAuthToken. On
mid-run 401, silently refreshes then automatically re-queues the
failed prompt so the user doesn't have to resend their message.

Previously, expired tokens required quitting and restarting the app.

fix: add retry to Codex token refresh and make re-auth flow provider-aware

Codex OAuth refresh now retries 3x with backoff (matching Claude fix).
startReauthFlow uses active provider instead of hardcoding Claude,
so Codex users get proper re-auth prompts too.

Fixes #20 #21

fix: handle OAuth token expiry mid-session and surface re-auth in desktop

Desktop now handles auth.reauth_required events from gateway, showing a
toast with a Re-authenticate button that opens the OAuth URL. Token
refresh retries up to 3 times with exponential backoff before giving up.

Fixes #27, relates to #20 #21
chore: bump version to 0.2.44
fixing bug
chore: bump version to 0.2.43
updated window prompt
chore: bump version to 0.2.42
feat(desktop): add cmd+shift+v markdown preview shortcut
chore: bump version to 0.2.41
feat(desktop): add cmd+p quick open for files
chore: bump version to 0.2.40

Merge pull request #28 from suitedaces/ishan/fix-codex-harness

Fix Codex provider integration and auth gating

commit.message: Fix Codex provider integration and auth gating
chore: bump version to 0.2.39
feat(desktop): add sand palette and fix monaco theme sync
chore: bump version to 0.2.38
feat(desktop): polish palette UX and editor/git responsiveness
feat(codex): add MCP OAuth credential storage setting
feat(desktop): restore default themes and add 8 palette options

fix: use draft releases to prevent empty release blocking auto-update

electron-builder now publishes to draft releases. The build workflow
already runs gh release edit --draft=false after assets upload, so
releases only become visible once latest-mac.yml is present.
chore: bump version to 0.2.36

fix: resolve all security vulnerabilities, add CI audit

- Replace xlsx (2 vulns, no patch) with exceljs (0 vulns)
- Override dompurify to 3.3.2 (fixes XSS via monaco-editor)
- Fix 5 npm audit issues (hono, express-rate-limit, ajv, qs)
- Add npm audit to build workflow
- Add security.yml: audit on push/PR + weekly Snyk scan
chore: bump version to 0.2.35

feat: header palette picker, fix state bugs, add aria

Palette dropdown in header next to sun/moon toggle. Fixed setPalette
reading glass from localStorage instead of React state. Added palette
validation on init. Color grid has proper aria radiogroup semantics.
chore: bump version to 0.2.34

feat: pastel color palettes + liquid glass theme system

6 palettes (Default, Catppuccin Mocha/Latte, Rosé Pine/Dawn) with
color grid picker in Settings. Liquid glass toggle adds frosted
backdrop-blur to panels. Terminal colors match each palette.
chore: bump version to 0.2.33

fix: persist sidebar state (open/closed, view mode, width)

Save showFiles, sidebarView, and panel width to localStorage.
Remove auto-close on window resize that was force-hiding the panel.
chore: bump version to 0.2.32

feat: editor opens in edit mode by default, autosave after 1s idle

Files now open editable instead of read-only. MonacoEditor autosaves
after 1 second of inactivity with proper cleanup on unmount.

fix: sidebar toggle always visible, add terminal button to right panel

Remove !layout.isMultiPane guard so file explorer toggle is accessible
in split screen. Add TerminalSquare icon to sidebar header for terminal
discoverability alongside Explorer and Source Control icons.

feat: real PTY terminal via node-pty, fix git status parser, add shell cleanup

Replace child_process.spawn with node-pty for interactive terminal support.
Fix git status NUL parser: untracked files use '?' status, handle worktree
renames/copies, fix shell.resize rejecting zero cols/rows. Add per-client
PTY cleanup on disconnect and server shutdown to prevent leaked processes.
Clean up dead ChildProcess import.
chore: bump version to 0.2.31

fix: use NUL-separated git status output to fix path parsing

The porcelain newline-based parser was stripping the first character
of file paths. Switch to -z (NUL-separated) format which is
unambiguous and also handles renames/copies correctly.
chore: bump version to 0.2.30

feat: show ahead/behind upstream counts on git panel

Branch bar shows ↑N ↓N indicators next to the branch name.
Pull button gets a badge count when behind upstream.
Tooltip shows contextual info (e.g. "Pull (3 behind)").
chore: bump version to 0.2.29

feat: add yazi-style keyboard navigation to file explorer

h/j/k/l and arrow keys for navigating the file tree. j/Down moves
down, k/Up moves up, l/Right expands folders or opens files,
h/Left collapses folders or navigates to parent. Enter toggles.
chore: bump version to 0.2.28

fix: use Vite ?worker import for Monaco editor worker

The new URL() pattern resolved relative to the source file, not
node_modules, breaking the production build. Use ?worker import
syntax instead. Only the base editor worker is needed since all
language features (IntelliSense, hover, etc.) are disabled.
chore: bump version to 0.2.27

fix: Monaco editor loader, worker setup, and memory management

- Use bundled monaco-editor directly instead of broken URL resolution
- Set up MonacoEnvironment.getWorker for all language workers via Vite
- Fix content update logic (track userDirtyRef, use executeEdits to preserve undo)
- Explicitly sync readOnly/renderLineHighlight via updateOptions on toggle
- Memoize options object to avoid unnecessary re-renders
- Dispose editor and model on unmount to prevent memory leaks
chore: bump version to 0.2.26

feat: replace Shiki with Monaco editor for code viewing and editing

Single MonacoEditor component handles both read-only viewing and editing
with full VS Code experience (syntax highlighting, folding, bracket
matching, Cmd+S save). Removes CodeViewer, CodeEditor, highlighter.ts,
and react-shiki package (16 transitive deps removed).
chore: bump version to 0.2.25

feat: VS Code-style desktop UX overhaul

- Git panel: floating branch picker (command palette style), file context
  menus (stage/unstage/discard/open/copy path/reveal), discard changes,
  stage all/unstage all RPCs, remote branch checkout with tracking
- File explorer: full right-click context menu (open, open to side, copy
  path, copy relative path, rename, delete, new file/folder, reveal in
  Finder, open in terminal)
- Tab bar: right-click context menu (close, close others, close all,
  close to right, copy path, split right/down)
- PDF viewer: continuous scroll, zoom controls, fit-to-width, keyboard
  shortcuts, IntersectionObserver page tracking
- Chat input: up-arrow history, slash commands autocomplete, drag-to-
  resize handle, Cmd+Shift+Enter newline hint
- Chat autoscroll: reliable scroll-to-bottom on mount and new messages
- Code viewer: proper min-height so theme background fills viewport
- File viewer: video/audio support, all unknown extensions fall back to
  plain text code view
- Context menu off-screen clamping for all menus
- Fix batch tab close (closeOtherTabs/closeAllTabs/closeTabsToRight)
  stale closure bug
- Backend: git.discardFile, git.stageAll, git.unstageAll RPCs, fs.reveal
chore: bump version to 0.2.24
fix: set releaseType to release so electron-builder uploads to existing GitHub releases
chore: bump version to 0.2.23

feat: support all file types in file explorer viewer

Add video (mp4, webm, mov, avi, mkv) and audio (mp3, wav, ogg, flac,
aac, m4a, opus) viewers. Unknown file extensions now fall back to
plain text instead of showing "unsupported file type".
chore: bump version to 0.2.22

move progress bar from sidebar to above chat input

Progress now appears as a subtle collapsed bar above the chat input,
showing the active step with a mini progress indicator. Click to expand
the full task list. Auto-hides when all tasks are complete. Each chat
panel gets its own progress (derived from chatItems), so multi-pane
layouts show per-session progress correctly.

releases.name: v0.2.56
releases.body:
- Terminal tabs persist across refresh (shell reclaimed on mount)
- File explorer remembers current directory, expanded folders, and selection
- Branch switch reloads file tree to reflect new branch contents

readme_html:
dorabot

A 24/7 self-learning AI agent with an integrated IDE workspace that runs itself.

Works with your existing Claude Code or OpenAI Codex subscription. No extra API key needed.

Download for macOS · Website · Discord · Demo

See it in action

The agent manages its own goals, tracks research, messages you on Telegram and WhatsApp, runs scheduled tasks, and remembers everything across sessions.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2ec5dd22-7b47-4ec0-a60b-62380e560bd0

Desktop IDE Workspace

Recent releases turned dorabot desktop into a practical IDE-style workspace:

  • File explorer with keyboard navigation and support for all file types
  • Monaco editor (edit mode by default, with autosave)
  • Git panel with ahead/behind status and cleaner staging flows
  • Real PTY terminal, tabs, split panes, and diff view

Persistent Memory & Self-Learning

Daily journals, curated memory, personality config. The agent remembers decisions, preferences, and context across every session. Full-text search over all past conversations. It gets better the more you use it.

Automations & Scheduling

Cron jobs, scheduled pulses, recurring tasks. The agent wakes up, does work, and messages you. iCal RRULE support, Apple Calendar sync (shows on Watch and iPhone).

Goals & Tasks

The agent proposes goals, writes plans, and executes them. You approve from the desktop app or Telegram. Full pipeline: research, plan, review, execute, done.

Research & Knowledge

The agent creates and maintains its own research for you. Topics tracked, categorized, and searchable. Point it at anything and it keeps the knowledge organized.

Multi-Channel Messaging

Same agent on WhatsApp and Telegram, with the same memory and context as desktop sessions. Send text, photos, voice, and documents.

Skills & MCP Servers

Built-in skills for GitHub, email, macOS, PR review, and agent swarms. Browse community skills and connect MCP servers via Smithery.

Also

  • Browser automation. 40+ actions with your real Chrome profile. Already logged in everywhere.
  • Multi-provider. Claude, OpenAI Codex, MiniMax. Use the model you're already paying for.
  • Multimodal. Send images, screenshots, diagrams. The agent sees them.
  • Auto-update. Signed, notarized, one-click updates.
  • Local-only. No cloud relay. Your data stays on your Mac.

Quick Start

Download

Download the macOS app -- open the DMG, drag to Applications. Onboarding walks you through setup.

Requires: macOS + a Claude Code or OpenAI Codex subscription (or any API key: Claude, OpenAI, MiniMax).

Build from source

git clone https://github.com/suitedaces/dorabot.git && cd dorabot
npm install && npm run build && npm link

npm run dev           # gateway + desktop with HMR
dorabot -g            # production gateway mode
dorabot -i            # interactive terminal
dorabot -m "message"  # one-off question

Personalization

The onboard skill interviews you and builds:

File What it does
SOUL.md How the agent talks and thinks
USER.md Who you are, your goals, context
MEMORY.md Facts that persist across sessions

All files live in ~/.dorabot/workspace/. Edit directly or let the agent manage them.

Security

Local-only, no telemetry. Scoped file access (sensitive dirs blocked). Token-authenticated gateway. Configurable tool approval per channel. macOS native sandbox.

FAQ

Contributing

Open an issue or PR on GitHub.

License

MIT
